name: Barri Office
description_short: Barri offers check cashing, money transfers, bill payment, mobile recharges, and personal loans through physical locations and a mobile app, serving primarily Spanish-speaking immigrants.
description_long:
Barri is an established money services company with over 30 years of experience in international money transfers and financial services. The company operates a hybrid model combining physical store locations with a mobile application to serve underbanked and immigrant communities, particularly those sending remittances to Latin America and the Caribbean.

Barri's service portfolio includes check cashing with extended hours and transparent pricing, domestic and international money transfers via online, app, or in-store channels, bill payment services (utilities, phone, internet), mobile phone recharges across the US and Latin America, and personal loans ($300-$10,000) through a partnership with Oportun. They also offer a Visa debit card branded with the Barri logo for account management and transactions.

The company differentiates itself through a 4.9-star app rating, multi-language support (Spanish-language website and marketing), extended store hours for check cashing, and integration of lending services via Oportun partnership. Their emphasis on ease of use and customer service responsiveness appears central to their positioning, with customer reviews highlighting reliability and convenience.

While Barri serves an important niche in the underbanked market, the company's primary offering remains traditional check-cashing and money transfer services rather than credit-building or financial products. The loan partnership with Oportun suggests they facilitate lending but do not originate loans directly. Specific fee structures and APRs for loans are not disclosed on their website.
address: 2237 E Riverside Dr suite b, Austin, TX 78741

company_info.headquarters: 2237 E Riverside Dr suite b, Austin, TX 78741

pros: Over 30 years of experience in money transfer and remittance services
4.9-star app rating with verified customer reviews across iOS and Android platforms
Extended hours for check cashing with transparent, competitive pricing
Multi-channel service delivery: physical stores, mobile app, and online ordering
International money transfer to Mexico, Central America, and South America
Integrated bill payment service for utilities, phones, and internet
Partnership with Oportun for personal loans up to $10,000 without traditional credit requirements
cons: No fee schedule or pricing transparency published on website for check cashing or transfers
Loans are facilitated through third-party partner (Oportun), not directly originated by Barri
Limited information on loan APRs, terms, or repayment options on their website
App-centric experience may exclude users without smartphones or digital literacy
No mention of FDIC insurance, fraud protection, or regulatory licensing information
best_for: Spanish-speaking immigrants sending remittances to Latin America and the Caribbean
Unbanked or underbanked consumers needing check cashing with extended hours
Individuals requiring quick personal loans ($300-$10,000) without traditional credit history
Mobile-first users managing bill payments and money transfers from their smartphone
diagnosis: Barri is best for Spanish-speaking immigrant communities and unbanked consumers seeking convenient check cashing, international remittance services, and small personal loans with flexible eligibility. The main caveat is that specific fee structures and loan terms are not transparently disclosed on their website, requiring direct inquiry for accurate cost comparison.
services: Check cashing with extended store hours
Domestic money transfers online, via app, or in-store
International money transfers to Mexico, Central America, and South America
Mobile phone recharges in the US and Latin America
Barri-branded Visa debit card for account management
Money transfer via Barri mobile application
